nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灰胸咬鵑
nodes.summary: 灰胸咬鵑（Whitehead's trogon，学名 Harpactes whiteheadi），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于婆罗洲、原始森林，常见栖息地包括开阔山地，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 开阔山地
nodes.summary: 地形开阔且便于大翼展鸟类活动的山地区域。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Whitehead's trogon is endemic to the island of Borneo, where it occurs in mountainous areas between in elevation. Restricted to primary forest, it favours damp valleys. It is an uncommon and poorly-known species

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Whitehead's trogon is endemic to the island of Borneo, where it occurs in mountainous areas between in elevation. Restricted to primary forest, it favours damp valleys. It is an uncommon and poorly-known species

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Whitehead's trogon is endemic to the island of Borneo, where it occurs in mountainous areas between in elevation. Restricted to primary forest, it favours damp valleys. It is an uncommon and poorly-known species

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Habitat loss is a key threat
